title: synoptReg
description: R package for computing synoptic climate classifications and spatial regionalization of environmental variables using gridded atmospheric data.

title: climaemet
description: R package (rOpenSpain) to download and visualize climate data from the Spanish Meteorological Agency (AEMET) API.

title: HIPEAtMount
description: Attribution of high-impact precipitation events to climate change in the European Alps. PI project funded by the Province of Bolzano (€172,750). Collaboration with ETH Zürich.

title: ATOC
description: Attribution of the unprecedented August 2023 Barcelona heatwave to observed and projected global warming. PI project funded by Barcelona City Council (€24,500).

title: Compound Events
description: Research on dry-hot compound events in the Pyrenees under current and future climate conditions, assessing changes in frequency, intensity, and duration using EURO-CORDEX data.
